prd.product_vision: Meu Sistema will serve operational and technical teams by turning the objective 'Gerar um sistema completo' into an executable platform focused on prd generation, architecture design, module planning, task generation, code generation, test generation, refactor planning, self improvement. The product should reduce manual work, standardize execution and keep delivery observable, resilient and extensible.

functionalities.name: Prd generation
functionalities.description: The platform must provide prd generation in a way that is aligned with the core objective: Gerar um sistema completo
functionalities.rationale: Prd generation is required to transform the requested objective into a usable product capability.

notes: Use a modular monolith in the MVP to accelerate delivery without breaking bounded contexts.
Keep orchestration and workflow execution behind application ports for future distributed adapters.
Adopt plugin contracts early so that product growth does not couple directly to the core.

roadmap.name: Phase 1 - Foundation
roadmap.objective: Establish the executable product foundation and planning artifacts.

roadmap.name: Phase 2 - Core Platform
roadmap.objective: Implement the execution core and operational services.

roadmap.name: Phase 3 - Agent Execution
roadmap.objective: Enable coordinated multi-agent execution on top of the core platform.

roadmap.name: Phase 4 - Operationalization
roadmap.objective: Prepare the product for real execution, testing and distribution.

architecture.architecture_summary: Meu Sistema should be implemented as a modular platform guided by Clean Architecture, Modular, Event Driven, Agent Oriented, Plugin Based. The initial system should center on core_runtime, agent_orchestrator, workflow_engine, task_manager, plugin_runtime, observability, keeping orchestration, workflow execution and extensibility behind stable boundaries.

modules.name: core_runtime
modules.responsibility: Bootstrap the system, load configuration and compose runtime services.

modules.name: agent_orchestrator
modules.responsibility: Coordinate department or product agents and maintain shared execution state.

modules.name: workflow_engine
modules.responsibility: Parse YAML workflows and execute sequences, conditions, loops and retries.

modules.name: task_manager
modules.responsibility: Create, queue, prioritize and monitor task execution across local or distributed runtimes.

modules.name: plugin_runtime
modules.responsibility: Load plugins dynamically and register extra steps, agents and integrations.

modules.name: observability
modules.responsibility: Provide structured logging, metrics, execution traces and dashboards.

repository_structure.responsibility: Declarative agent definitions and agent manifests.
Application use cases, services and ports.
Composition root, settings and runtime bootstrap.
CLI and future API interface adapters.
Shared enums, ids, errors and event envelopes.

modules.responsibility: Provide structured logging, metrics, execution traces and dashboards.
Load plugins dynamically and register extra steps, agents and integrations.
Create, queue, prioritize and monitor task execution across local or distributed runtimes.
Parse YAML workflows and execute sequences, conditions, loops and retries.
Coordinate department or product agents and maintain shared execution state.
Bootstrap the system, load configuration and compose runtime services.

from __future__ import annotations

from pcbagent.generated.core_runtime.coreruntimemodule import CoreRuntimeModule


def test_core_runtime_starter_class_executes() -> None:
    instance = CoreRuntimeModule()
    result = instance.execute()

    assert result["module"] == "core_runtime"
    assert result["class"] == "CoreRuntimeModule"
    assert result["status"] == "ready"
